headline: SBAC Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Higher Leasing Revenue
summary: SBAC beat Q1 estimates as international leasing revenues surge 32.6%, helping lift full-year 2026 guidance despite rising costs.

raw.headline: SBAC Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Higher Leasing Revenue
raw.summary: SBAC beat Q1 estimates as international leasing revenues surge 32.6%, helping lift full-year 2026 guidance despite rising costs.

headline: SBA (SBAC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Need a quote from a Motley Fool analyst?  Given the solid start of the year, we are increasing our full year outlook for all key metrics, including site leasing revenue, our cash flow, adjusted EBITDA, AFFO and AFFO per share as compared to our initial 2026 guidance.

raw.headline: SBA (SBAC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on SBA Communications, Raises Price Target to $250
summary: Keybanc  analyst Brandon Nispel   maintains SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $235 to $250.
